title: secret_fp_detection_response
description: Response schema for the Secret Detection false positive detection agent that provides a likelihood score and explanation.

false_positive_likelihood.description: The likelihood that this secret detection finding is a false positive, as a percentage from 0-100. 0-20 = definitely a real leaked secret, 21-40 = likely real, 41-60 = uncertain, 61-80 = likely false positive, 81-100 = definitely false positive.

explanation.description: Detailed explanation of the false positive analysis, including evidence and reasoning for the likelihood score.
examples: The detected value uses explicit placeholder syntax ${API_KEY}...
